import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import useScrollReveal from '../components/useScrollReveal'; import './About.css'; const TEAM = [ { name: 'Alex Carter', role: 'Founder & Creative Director', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/mJOEscaN4cJv2tpti4OUyPBLdw.png?width=800&height=1200' }, { name: 'Maya Lin', role: 'Lead Designer', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/eTTTIcVnwyKXnDY6kbVhA1AyzQ.png?width=1200&height=1200' }, { name: 'Jordan Reyes', role: 'Web Developer', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/DlWgeWLMfo738PcrIKpMn8HWwQ.jpg?width=715&height=1200' }, { name: 'Leo Kim', role: 'Motion & Visual Designer', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/wbxIVTywMZsTgcaCk4yAlWG2VU.jpg?width=1200&height=715' }, { name: 'Olivia Hart', role: 'Brand Strategist', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/2UD1Kj1UE902txpUo5GdVYNTRTw.png?width=1200&height=735' }, { name: 'Ethan Cole', role: 'Senior Visual Designer', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/Xo1CApygJhobMFiwnJQZRhcANsk.png?width=715&height=1200' }, { name: 'Sofia Ramirez', role: 'UX Researcher', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/AmCFmXVlBSWxWEmpdmCrUODIs.png?width=1200&height=748' }, { name: 'Daniel Knox', role: 'Marketing & Content Lead', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/WB0ccd7eXi9C84QrCWCHsiIrM14.png?width=1190&height=1200' }, ]; const AWARDS = [ { award: 'Best Digital Design Studio', org: 'Creative Excellence Awards', year: '2024' }, { award: 'Best UI/UX Design', org: 'Web Vision Awards', year: '2024' }, { award: 'Top 10 Web Agencies', org: 'Digital Creators List', year: '2024' }, { award: 'Top Branding Agency', org: 'Design Innovators Summit', year: '2023' }, { award: 'Outstanding Motion Graphics', org: 'Visual Impact Awards', year: '2023' }, ]; const CLIENT_LOGOS = [ 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/lBk7MKclfzJRlatPc13MvYtptk.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/OHfziRjK2HdoOgrAXlPXc55VYQ.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/C8vnHs7e8IbLZooep0gNip6eylU.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/KNj9BRJvdrtCaYx5m7um7EmT8.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/8wpt2H14XHcb4yoW182iK0MGxs.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/jqmWIOA4WlrHoWQKgzTtrOgybg.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/qNMZaMQpAKdhOYxA9xp6LSCc54.svg', ]; export default function About() { const ref = useScrollReveal(); return (
{/* ── Hero ── */}
About us

Scarlet a digital design studio based in London, built for brands that refuse to blend in. Through cutting-edge visuals, strategic storytelling, and innovative design, we transform ideas into unforgettable digital identities.

{/* ── Mission ── */}
Our mission

We believe design should be bold, purposeful, and impactful. Our mission is to help brands break through the noise with visuals that tell a story, engage audiences, and leave a lasting impression.

{/* Stats */}
{[ { num: '15+', label: 'Years of Experience' }, { num: '100+', label: 'Projects completed' }, { num: '97%', label: 'Client satisfaction rate' }, { num: '75%', label: 'Conversion rate improvement' }, ].map(s => (
{s.num}
{s.label}
))}
{/* ── Team photo after stats ── */}
{/* ── What we do ── */}
What we do

From branding to web design, UI/UX, and motion graphics, we craft stunning digital experiences tailored to your vision.

Every project we take on is driven by strategy, creativity, and a commitment to excellence.

View projects ↗
{/* Logo marquee */}
{[...CLIENT_LOGOS, ...CLIENT_LOGOS].map((l, i) => ( ))}
{/* ── Team ── */}
Our team

Meet the Scarlet Team.

We're a team of passionate creatives and designers with a bold vision and a detail-driven approach.

Contact us ↗
{TEAM.map((m, i) => (

{m.name}

{m.role}

))}
{/* ── Awards ── */}
Achievements

Awards &
Recognition.

We're proud to have our work recognized by industry leaders. Here are some of the accolades we've earned.

{AWARDS.map((a, i) => (
{a.award}
{a.org}
{a.year}
))}
{/* ── Life at Scarlet ── */}

Life at Scarlet.

At Scarlet, creativity thrives in an environment built for innovation, collaboration, and a little bit of fun.

Join us ↗
2025
2024
); }
